requirement_topic.en: Import Declaration and Customs — Declaration of Conformity and Energy Certificate for Vietnam Customs
requirement_topic.zh: 进口申报与海关 — 越南海关符合性声明和能效证书
requirement_topic.zht: 進口申報與海關 — 越南海關符合性聲明和能效證書

summary.en: Motors imported into Vietnam under QCVN 04:2009/BCT scope require a declaration of conformity (cong bo hop quy) submitted to MOIT, a QUATEST or STAMEQ-accredited lab test report, and a valid MOIT energy label certificate before customs clearance. Vietnam Customs (General Department of Vietnam Customs, GDVC) may require presentation of the conformity declaration and energy label certificate at the point of import. Importers must ensure all documents are in Vietnamese or accompanied by certified translations. HS code classification determines whether the motor falls under controlled goods lists requiring pre-clearance.
summary.zh: QCVN 04:2009/BCT 适用范围内进口至越南的电动机，在海关清关前须向工贸部提交符合性声明（cong bo hop quy），以及 QUATEST 或经 STAMEQ 认可实验室出具的检测报告，并持有有效的工贸部能效标签证书。越南海关总局（GDVC）可能在进口时要求出示符合性声明和能效标签证书。进口商须确保所有文件为越南文或附有经认证的翻译。HS 编码分类决定该电动机是否属于需要预清关的管控商品。
summary.zht: QCVN 04:2009/BCT 適用範圍內進口至越南的電動機，在海關清關前須向工貿部提交符合性聲明（cong bo hop quy），以及 QUATEST 或經 STAMEQ 認可實驗室出具的檢測報告，並持有有效的工貿部能效標籤證書。越南海關總局（GDVC）可能在進口時要求出示符合性聲明和能效標籤證書。進口商須確保所有文件為越南文或附有經認證的翻譯。HS 編碼分類決定該電動機是否屬於需要預清關的管控商品。

standards_or_laws: GDVC (General Department of Vietnam Customs) import regulations

summary.en: China's export documentation for industrial motors typically includes a CCC certificate, GB 18613-2020 compliance evidence, factory test reports, and standard commercial export documents (commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin). For motors exported to Vietnam under China-ASEAN FTA (ACFTA), a Form E certificate of origin may reduce import tariff rates. Chinese export documents must be supplemented by Vietnam-specific conformity documentation; they do not replace MOIT and QUATEST requirements.
summary.zh: 中国工业电动机出口文件通常包括 CCC 证书、GB 18613-2020 合规证据、工厂测试报告及标准商业出口单证（商业发票、装箱单、原产地证明）。根据中国-东盟自贸协定（ACFTA），向越南出口的电动机如持有 Form E 原产地证书，可享受进口关税优惠。中国出口文件须补充越南专项合规文件，不能替代工贸部和 QUATEST 要求。
summary.zht: 中國工業電動機出口文件通常包括 CCC 證書、GB 18613-2020 合規證據、工廠測試報告及標準商業出口單證（商業發票、裝箱單、原產地證明）。根據中國-東盟自貿協定（ACFTA），向越南出口的電動機如持有 Form E 原產地證書，可享受進口關稅優惠。中國出口文件須補充越南專項合規文件，不能替代工貿部和 QUATEST 要求。

standards_or_laws: China-ASEAN FTA (ACFTA) Form E certificate of origin

gap.en: Chinese export documentation (CCC, GB 18613-2020) does not substitute for Vietnam import requirements. Importers must obtain: (1) QUATEST or STAMEQ-accredited lab test report; (2) MOIT energy label certificate; (3) declaration of conformity filed with MOIT; and (4) ensure customs documents include the energy label reference. Form E origin certificate can reduce ACFTA tariff rates and should be obtained for cost efficiency. Documentation must be in Vietnamese or with certified translation.
gap.zh: 中国出口文件（CCC、GB 18613-2020）不能替代越南进口要求。进口商须取得：（1）QUATEST 或经 STAMEQ 认可实验室的检测报告；（2）工贸部能效标签证书；（3）向工贸部提交的符合性声明；（4）确保海关文件包含能效标签参考信息。Form E 原产地证书可享受 ACFTA 关税优惠，建议为降低成本而申请。文件须为越南文或附经认证翻译。
gap.zht: 中國出口文件（CCC、GB 18613-2020）不能替代越南進口要求。進口商須取得：（1）QUATEST 或經 STAMEQ 認可實驗室的檢測報告；（2）工貿部能效標籤證書；（3）向工貿部提交的符合性聲明；（4）確保海關文件包含能效標籤參考信息。Form E 原產地證書可享受 ACFTA 關稅優惠，建議為降低成本而申請。文件須為越南文或附經認證翻譯。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — declaration of conformity to MOIT + MOIT energy label certificate required before Vietnam customs clearance for in-scope motors
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC and GB 18613-2020 documentation required for China domestic market; Form E is optional (tariff benefit)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor exporters must obtain Vietnam-specific MOIT energy label, QUATEST test report, and declaration of conformity before shipment. Consider Form E (ACFTA) for tariff reduction. Chinese CCC documentation does not substitute for Vietnam import requirements. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电动机出口商须在出货前取得越南专项工贸部能效标签、QUATEST 测试报告及符合性声明。建议申请 Form E（ACFTA）以享受关税优惠。中国 CCC 文件不能替代越南进口要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電動機出口商須在出貨前取得越南專項工貿部能效標籤、QUATEST 測試報告及符合性聲明。建議申請 Form E（ACFTA）以享受關稅優惠。中國 CCC 文件不能替代越南進口要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Tariff and Trade — China-ASEAN FTA (ACFTA) preferential duty and import duty rates
requirement_topic.zh: 关税与贸易 — 中国-东盟自贸协定（ACFTA）优惠税率与进口关税
requirement_topic.zht: 關稅與貿易 — 中國-東盟自貿協定（ACFTA）優惠稅率與進口關稅

summary.en: Vietnam's import duty on industrial electric motors (HS 8501.52 — AC motors, multi-phase, output 750W–75kW; 8501.53 — above 75kW) varies by HS subheading and whether the ACFTA preferential rate applies. Under the China-ASEAN Free Trade Agreement (ACFTA), Chinese-origin motors may qualify for reduced or zero duty with a valid Form E certificate of origin issued by Chinese customs/CCPIT. Standard MFN tariff rates for motors may range from 0–10% depending on the HS code; ACFTA rates can be significantly lower. VAT at 10% applies on import. Importers must confirm current ACFTA rates via Vietnam Customs or MOIT trade databases.
summary.zh: 越南工业电动机进口关税（HS 8501.52 — 交流电动机，多相，输出750W–75kW；8501.53 — 75kW以上）因HS子目及是否适用ACFTA优惠税率而不同。根据中国-东盟自贸协定（ACFTA），持有中国海关/贸促会签发的有效Form E原产地证书的中国原产电动机可享受减免关税优惠。电动机MFN标准关税率因HS编码不同可能在0–10%之间；ACFTA税率通常显著更低。进口环节征收10%增值税。进口商须通过越南海关或工贸部贸易数据库确认当前ACFTA税率。
summary.zht: 越南工業電動機進口關稅（HS 8501.52 — 交流電動機，多相，輸出750W–75kW；8501.53 — 75kW以上）因HS子目及是否適用ACFTA優惠稅率而不同。根據中國-東盟自貿協定（ACFTA），持有中國海關/貿促會簽發的有效Form E原產地證書的中國原產電動機可享受減免關稅優惠。電動機MFN標準關稅率因HS編碼不同可能在0–10%之間；ACFTA稅率通常顯著更低。進口環節徵收10%增值稅。進口商須通過越南海關或工貿部貿易數據庫確認當前ACFTA稅率。

standards_or_laws: China-ASEAN Free Trade Agreement (ACFTA) — Form E certificate of origin

summary.en: Chinese motor manufacturers exporting to Vietnam can benefit from ACFTA preferential duty rates by obtaining a Form E certificate of origin (issued by China Customs or CCPIT). The Form E declares that the motor meets ACFTA rules of origin (typically regional value content and HS tariff change criteria). Motors must be shipped directly from China or transit without modification. ACFTA duty reduction is separate from and in addition to compliance with QCVN 04:2009/BCT energy efficiency requirements.
summary.zh: 中国电动机制造商向越南出口时，可通过取得Form E原产地证书（由中国海关或贸促会签发）享受ACFTA优惠关税。Form E证明电动机符合ACFTA原产地规则（通常为区域价值成分和HS税号改变标准）。电动机须从中国直接运输或在未经加工的情况下转运。ACFTA关税减免与QCVN 04:2009/BCT能效合规要求相互独立，不能相互替代。
summary.zht: 中國電動機製造商向越南出口時，可通過取得Form E原產地證書（由中國海關或貿促會簽發）享受ACFTA優惠關稅。Form E證明電動機符合ACFTA原產地規則（通常為區域價值成分和HS稅號改變標準）。電動機須從中國直接運輸或在未經加工的情況下轉運。ACFTA關稅減免與QCVN 04:2009/BCT能效合規要求相互獨立，不能相互替代。

standards_or_laws: ACFTA Form E (certificate of origin, issued by China Customs / CCPIT)
ACFTA rules of origin (RVC and CTC criteria)

gap.en: ACFTA preferential rates are available to Chinese motor exporters but require a Form E certificate of origin — this is a procedural step many first-time exporters overlook, defaulting to MFN tariff rates and paying excess duty. The 10% Vietnam VAT on import is non-reducible regardless of ACFTA status. There is no tariff gap in the sense of absolute prohibition; the gap is procedural (Form E application) and cost-related (MFN vs. ACFTA rate differential).
gap.zh: ACFTA优惠税率适用于中国电动机出口商，但须取得Form E原产地证书——这一程序步骤常被首次出口商忽视，导致按最惠国税率缴纳超额关税。无论是否享受ACFTA优惠，进口环节10%越南增值税均不可减免。不存在绝对禁止意义上的关税差距；差距在于程序（Form E申请）和成本（最惠国税率与ACFTA税率之差）。
gap.zht: ACFTA優惠稅率適用於中國電動機出口商，但須取得Form E原產地證書——這一程序步驟常被首次出口商忽視，導致按最惠國稅率繳納超額關稅。無論是否享受ACFTA優惠，進口環節10%越南增值稅均不可減免。不存在絕對禁止意義上的關稅差距；差距在於程序（Form E申請）和成本（最惠國稅率與ACFTA稅率之差）。

mandatory_status.target: Form E optional (but recommended for duty reduction); 10% import VAT mandatory; MFN tariff applies without Form E
mandatory_status.cn: Form E issued by China Customs / CCPIT — optional for exporters but required to access ACFTA preferential rate

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor exporters should apply for Form E (ACFTA) to access preferential import duty rates in Vietnam. Without Form E, MFN tariff rates apply. Import VAT at 10% is mandatory regardless. Actual tariff rates depend on HS subheading and current ACFTA schedules — verify with Vietnam Customs or a licensed customs broker before shipment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电动机出口商应申请Form E（ACFTA）以享受越南进口优惠关税。未持Form E时适用最惠国税率。10%进口增值税强制适用，不受ACFTA状态影响。实际关税率取决于HS子目和当前ACFTA税率表——出货前请向越南海关或持牌报关行确认。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電動機出口商應申請Form E（ACFTA）以享受越南進口優惠關稅。未持Form E時適用最惠國稅率。10%進口增值稅強制適用，不受ACFTA狀態影響。實際關稅率取決於HS子目和當前ACFTA稅率表——出貨前請向越南海關或持牌報關行確認。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Market Surveillance and STAMEQ — Ongoing compliance monitoring after import
requirement_topic.zh: 市场监督与STAMEQ — 进口后持续合规监督
requirement_topic.zht: 市場監督與STAMEQ — 進口後持續合規監督

summary.en: Vietnam's market surveillance for energy-efficient products including motors is conducted by STAMEQ (Vietnam Standards and Quality Institute, under the Ministry of Science and Technology) and MOIT energy efficiency inspectors. Products found to be non-compliant with QCVN 04:2009/BCT after market entry may be subject to recalls, fines, or import bans. Importers and distributors are responsible for ensuring ongoing QCVN compliance throughout the product's market life. STAMEQ periodically samples products from the market and sends them to accredited laboratories for verification testing.
summary.zh: 越南对包括电动机在内的能效产品的市场监督，由STAMEQ（越南标准与质量研究院，隶属科技部）和工贸部能效检查员负责。进入市场后被发现不符合QCVN 04:2009/BCT的产品，可能面临召回、罚款或进口禁令。进口商和经销商须确保产品在越南市场全生命周期内持续符合QCVN要求。STAMEQ会定期对市场产品进行抽样，送至经认可实验室进行核验测试。
summary.zht: 越南對包括電動機在內的能效產品的市場監督，由STAMEQ（越南標準與質量研究院，隸屬科技部）和工貿部能效檢查員負責。進入市場後被發現不符合QCVN 04:2009/BCT的產品，可能面臨召回、罰款或進口禁令。進口商和經銷商須確保產品在越南市場全生命周期內持續符合QCVN要求。STAMEQ會定期對市場產品進行抽樣，送至經認可實驗室進行核驗測試。

standards_or_laws: STAMEQ (Vietnam Standards and Quality Institute, under MOST)

summary.en: China's market surveillance for motor energy efficiency is conducted by SAMR (State Administration for Market Regulation) and provincial market regulation bureaux. SAMR conducts periodic spot-checks (飞行检查/监督抽查) on motors in the market to verify GB 18613-2020 compliance. Non-compliant motors may be recalled, fined, or the manufacturer's CCC certificate suspended. China's market surveillance framework is not reciprocated by Vietnam; exporters must manage separate compliance obligations in both jurisdictions.
summary.zh: 中国对电动机能效的市场监督由国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）和各省市场监管局负责。SAMR对市场上的电动机定期开展飞行检查/监督抽查，核验GB 18613-2020合规情况。不合规电动机可能面临召回、罚款，或制造商CCC证书被暂停。中国的市场监督框架在越南不具有对等效力；出口商须分别管理两个司法辖区的合规义务。
summary.zht: 中國對電動機能效的市場監督由國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）和各省市場監管局負責。SAMR對市場上的電動機定期開展飛行檢查/監督抽查，核驗GB 18613-2020合規情況。不合規電動機可能面臨召回、罰款，或製造商CCC證書被暫停。中國的市場監督框架在越南不具有對等效力；出口商須分別管理兩個司法轄區的合規義務。

standards_or_laws: SAMR (State Administration for Market Regulation) — China market surveillance

gap.en: China's market surveillance compliance track record (SAMR) does not carry over to Vietnam. Exporters and Vietnam importers/distributors must maintain their own QCVN 04:2009/BCT conformity records, energy label certificates, and QUATEST test reports to respond to STAMEQ spot-checks. Product changes or new model variants may require new QUATEST testing. The ongoing compliance burden is separate from and in addition to the initial import clearance documentation.
gap.zh: 中国SAMR市场监督合规记录不延伸至越南。出口商和越南进口商/经销商须自行保留QCVN 04:2009/BCT合规记录、能效标签证书和QUATEST测试报告，以应对STAMEQ抽检。产品变更或新型号变体可能需要重新进行QUATEST测试。持续合规负担独立于并额外于初始进口清关文件要求。
gap.zht: 中國SAMR市場監督合規記錄不延伸至越南。出口商和越南進口商/經銷商須自行保留QCVN 04:2009/BCT合規記錄、能效標籤證書和QUATEST測試報告，以應對STAMEQ抽檢。產品變更或新型號變體可能需要重新進行QUATEST測試。持續合規負擔獨立於並額外於初始進口清關文件要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory ongoing — STAMEQ / MOIT market surveillance; importers/distributors responsible for continued QCVN 04:2009/BCT compliance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory ongoing — SAMR market surveillance for GB 18613-2020; separate from Vietnam obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Vietnam importers and distributors of Chinese motors must maintain QCVN 04:2009/BCT conformity records and energy label certificates for STAMEQ spot-checks after market entry. China SAMR compliance records have no standing in Vietnam. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电动机越南进口商和经销商须在市场准入后保留QCVN 04:2009/BCT合规记录和能效标签证书，以备STAMEQ抽检。中国SAMR合规记录在越南不具效力。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電動機越南進口商和經銷商須在市場准入後保留QCVN 04:2009/BCT合規記錄和能效標籤證書，以備STAMEQ抽檢。中國SAMR合規記錄在越南不具效力。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
